idea.title: Orb Champions
idea.hook: Match orbs to power your champions and summon a legendary team.
idea.hook_ru: Собирай орбы, усиливай чемпионов и призывай легендарную команду.
idea.why_novel: First Puzzle-and-Dragons-style match-orb battler in the portfolio, paired with a gacha champion collection (visible pity, rotating rate-up banners, element team synergy). A high-retention collection genre we had not built before.

ten_min_loop: A 6x5 orb board: drag one orb to line up 3+ of a color, combos cascade and multiply damage, and element-matched champions attack via a type chart. Clear 3-5 waves then a boss per stage. Between battles: summon the gacha (visible pity + rotating rate-up banner), star-up duplicates, build a 5-champion team by element, claim the daily free pull. Earned and rewarded-ad currency only.

sources.title: Gacha + otome pivot (2026-06-05)
sources.snippet: Tim asked to pivot from casual toys toward proven high-retention gacha/collection genres. Realizes the Puzzle-and-Dragons plus lootbox-monster-collection idea.
